<?php namespace Twilio\Rest; use Twilio\Rest\PreviewMessaging\V1; class PreviewMessaging extends PreviewMessagingBase { /** * @deprecated Use v1->oauth instead. */ protected function getMessages(): \Twilio\Rest\PreviewMessaging\V1\MessageList { return $this->v1->messages; } /** * @deprecated Use v1->oauth() instead. */ protected function getBroadcasts(): \Twilio\Rest\PreviewMessaging\V1\BroadcastList { return $this->v1->broadcasts; } }
